Part C risk adjustment model coefficients continue to be calibrated on the OM population. CMS calibrates Part D risk 
adjustment models using prescription drug event (PDE) data from both OM and MA-PD enrollees. 

The HCC-based payment risk scores are estimates of the projected costs for the beneficiary relative to the national average
